title: Trump addresses rising oil prices in US-Iran war
shortDescription: "As soon as this ends, those prices are going to drop." President Donald Trump commented optimistically as U.S. oil prices were up 4.7% on March 3.

title: A closer look at Rep. Jasmine Crockett, running for US Senate
shortDescription: Rep. Jasmine Crockett, an American lawyer and politician who represents the 30th Congressional district in Texas since January 2023.

title: How one Republican could unleash Senate chaos over Kristi Noem
shortDescription: North Carolina Republican Sen. Thom Tillis threatened to hold up legislative business unless the Homeland Security secretary answers his questions.

title: Control of Congress at stake as midterms kick off
shortDescription: Voters in Texas, Arkansas and North Carolina head to the polls to determine the Republican and Democratic nominees for November's congressional races.

title: Primary election updates: Crockett, Talarico clash in bitter Texas race
shortDescription: Voters in Texas, North Carolina and Arkansas kicked off the 2026 midterm season. Follow live updates.

title: New York City congestion pricing upheld against Trump DOT
shortDescription: The federal judge, appointed by President Trump, wrote the decision to try to end the program was “arbitrary and capricious."

title: 'Conflict arises from ignorance.' Melania Trump chairs UNSC meeting
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump presided over a United Nations Security Council meeting. The historic appearance came as the war in Iran is escalating.

title: Many in California have 'complex' feelings towards Trump's Iran War
shortDescription: Hundreds celebrated the death of that Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, but as the war continues, many questions what's next for the war.

title: ‘Draft Barron Trump’ calls for Barron to join US strikes in Iran
shortDescription: "DraftBarronTrump.com" is the work of Toby Morton, a former writer on "South Park." It is one of the dozens of websites that parody politicians.

title: Trump details military strikes in Iran
shortDescription: Trump touts US military strikes in Iran stating forces suffered massive losses and "everything knocked out" in recent operations.

title: Amid crowded field, CA democrats to take hard look at governor's bid
shortDescription: The California Democratic Party chair asked candidates to "honestly assess" their campaign and candidacy in a race lacking a clear frontrunner.

title: JB Pritzker's office denies link to Epstein after Bill Clinton testimony
shortDescription: Bill Clinton mentioned Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker during his four-hour testimony about Jeffrey Epstein last week. See Pritzker's response.

title: Trump’s Iran war sends Congress scrambling
shortDescription: By sucking up all the DC political oxygen and consuming lawmakers’ time, the war is already threatening to preoccupy Congress ahead of the midterms.

title: Noem testifies in Senate after a deadly Minnesota enforcement surge
shortDescription: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem testifies after a deadly Minnesota enforcement surge, a DHS funding impasse and U.S. attacks in Iran.

title: Trump admin does about-face in court on orders targeting law firms
shortDescription: A day after dropping its appeal against court rulings striking down orders targeting law firms, the Trump administration asked to renew its fight.

title: Noem grilled on ICE, Minnesota at Senate hearing: Recap
shortDescription: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem was grilled at a Senate hearing about ICE surges, the shooting of U.S. citizens and luxury planes.
